name: storyboard-image-poc
description: Storyboard prompt and image generation POC

scripts.prestart: npm run css:build && npm run prisma:build
scripts.start: nodemon --watch server.js --watch src --watch pages --watch public --watch styles --watch stylesheets --watch style-references --ignore public/css --ext js,json,html,css,md,png --exec "npm run css:build && node server.js"
scripts.test:db: npm run prisma:build && prisma migrate deploy && PRISMA_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 node --require ./test/setup.js --test --test-concurrency=1 test/prisma-*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run css:check && npm run prisma:build && node --check server.js && find src public/js -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
